  • The "princess" you are in, is a lady from a medium-known vessel kingdom, Cartecia. But you are quite special! You are blessed since little with abundant blessing shining in your chest! They said, those who killed you, could reclaim that blessing. Also, you were known as naive, in the novel says. Mind change that?

  • Switz House was always obsessed with aesthetic, beauty and opulence. Besides the fact the house also the home of high-end jewelries and strong in economics.

  • Uh oh. That doesn't mean Switz is safe. Switz nobles will actually judge your attitude and the way you talk, besides your appearance. Real gossip-field..
